originalTitle: Fixing Reinforcement Learning with PufferLib - Live Dev
title: Integrating Isaac Gym Motion Loading and Refining Pareto Front Optimization
summary: Worked on integrating Isaac Gym humanoid motion data with PufferLib, cleaned up environment code from a collaborator, and debugged data loading issues. Switched to improving hyperparameter sweep algorithms for Pareto front optimization, testing normalization and rank transforms.
